\tzpentry{ID3598}{Quantum Gyromagnetic Pi Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3598 introduces Quantum Gyromagnetic Pi Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \pi_\omega &= \frac{\partial \mathcal{L}}{\partial \dot{\omega}_{\text{gyro}}} = I_{\text{gyro}} \cdot \vec{\omega}_{\text{gyro}} + \frac{g\mu_B}{\hbar} \vec{\mu}_{\text{total}} \\ \pi_r &= \frac{\partial \mathcal{L}}{\partial \dot{\vec{r}}_{\text{cm}}} = m_{\text{total}} \dot{\vec{r}}_{\text{cm}} \end{align}
